title: NxDeathCoords
description: 💀 Never lose your death spot again — track your last death coordinates easily!
body:
# 💀 NxDeathCoords  
*A lightweight plugin that shows your last death coordinates instantly!*

---

## 📦 Plugin Information  
- **Name:** NxDeathCoords  
- **Version:** 1.0.0  
- **Developer:** NotRenzo  
- **Support Server:** [Join Discord](https://dc.gg/nxdevelopment)  
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21+  
- **API:** Spigot / Paper  

---

## ✨ Features  
✅ Automatically records your death coordinates  
✅ Use `/deathcoords` to view your last death location  
✅ Customizable death messages and sounds  
✅ Optional broadcast death messages  
✅ Lightweight, lag-free and beginner friendly  

---

## ⚙️ Commands  
| Command | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `/deathcoords` | View your last death coordinates |

---

## 🔒 Permissions  
| Permission | Description | Default |
|-------------|--------------|----------|
| `nxdeathcoords.use` | Allows players to use `/deathcoords` | ✅ true |

---

## ⚙️ Configuration Preview
```yaml
messages:
  death-location:
    - "&c☠ You died at:"
    - "&7World: &e{world}"
    - "&7X: &e{x}"
    - "&7Y: &e{y}"
    - "&7Z: &e{z}"
    - "&aUse &e/deathcoords &ato see your last death location again!"
  no-death-data: "&cYou haven’t died yet!"

options:
  send-on-death: true
  broadcast-death: false
  play-sound: true
  sound: "ENTITY_EXPERIENCE_ORB_PICKUP"
  ```

---


## 💬 Support

Need help or want to suggest new features?
👉 [Join our support Discord](https://dc.gg/nxdevelopment)


*Made with ❤️ by NotRenzo*
